source_notes: Peregrine Space working brief in Drive.
Example sandbox data for local scoring; not production account research.

evidence.summary: Active NewSpace build cycle likely creates demand for precision payload and timing/navigation components.
evidence.ability_to_act_evidence: Funded NewSpace company building mission-critical infrastructure.
evidence.willingness_to_act_evidence: Founder attention was triggered by Xona as a live account in prior Peregrine work.

evidence.summary: Satellite communications focus may align with optical communications components.
evidence.willingness_to_act_evidence: Product fit is plausible, but no direct timing event is confirmed in sandbox data.

evidence.summary: Large prime likely has high flight-heritage barrier and slower vendor approval.
evidence.ability_to_act_evidence: Budget exists, but procurement friction is high.
evidence.willingness_to_act_evidence: No current willingness signal in sandbox data.
